title: Business Model Canvas Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Business Model Canvas skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

description_target_customer.description: Description of the target customer segments served or proposed

current_proposed_value.description: Current or proposed value proposition for each segment

existing_revenue_cost.description: Existing revenue and cost data or reliable estimates

organizational_capability_inventory.description: Organizational capability inventory covering resources, activities, and key partnerships

competitor_business_model.description: Competitor business model profiles for benchmarking

customer_research_data.description: Customer research data or Jobs-to-be-Done analysis to sharpen value proposition articulation
